Start Full Examination Session

Launch all your examinations in sequence with automatic timed breaks:
Exam 1 → 10-min break → Exam 2 → 30-min break → Exam 3 → 10-min break → Exam 4 → Session Complete

Each exam: 1h 30min countdown · Auto-submits at time limit
📋

Examination Format

Format: Passage-based multiple choice
Questions: 250 per examination
Passages: KJV Scripture with each question
Passing Score: 65%
Time Limit: None (self-paced)
Attempts: Unlimited retakes
